title: Team

2 Collaboration rules (simple)

Pull before you start work.
Commit small changes with clear messages.
Only one person edits the same .qmd file at a time.
Use Issues (optional) for tasks/bugs.

title: Non Alcoholic Fatty Liveer Disease & Fibrosis Transcriptomics
text:
As NAFLD fibrosis stage increases, do liver gene expression patterns shift toward increased inflammation and insulin resistance and decreased lipid metabolism? For our project we will be using GSE135251 as our dataset. This dataset comes from human liver biopsies and contains RNA sequence raw counts data. The sample size is 216. We will use DESeq2 for differential expression analysis and clusterProfiler for pathway analysis. Our deliverables include PCA plots, Volcano plot, Heatmaps, and Gene Annotation plot.
Write 4–6 sentences describing: - the problem or question - the dataset(s) - your approach (methods) - what you will deliver (figures, model, dashboard, etc.)
